title: Vulkan My MC
description: Modpack that behaves like vanilla but with VulkanMod and a few other optimisation mods slapped onto it.
body:
# Vulkan My MC
**!! ⚠️ This modpack only runs on GPUs that support Vulkan 1.2 or higher. ⚠️ !!**

A VulkanMod-Based Modpack with an emphasis of behaving entirely like Vanilla, but faster.

- ✅ = Fully supported.
- ⚰️ = Was supported, not updated anymore.
- ❌ = Not supported.

| Minecraft Version  | Supported? |
| ------------- | ------------- |
| 1.21.11       | ✅  |
| 1.21.10       | ✅  |
| 1.21.6-1.21.9 | ❌  |
| 1.21.5        | ✅  |
| 1.21.4        | ✅  |
| 1.21.3        | ✅  |
| 1.21.2        | ❌  |
| 1.21.1        | ✅  |
| 1.20.2-1.21   | ❌  |
| 1.20.1        | ⚰️  |
| <=1.20        | ❌  |

![FPS Comparison between Vulkan My MC, Simply Optimised and Vanilla Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cH7wOs7n/images/85aec575198af98f5d988341742e4e74895c89e4.png)

**^ FPS Comparison between Vulkan My MC, Simply Optimised and Vanilla Minecraft standing still.**

**Specs: RTX 2060, Ryzen 5 4500, at 2560x1440**

Vulkan My MC settings: Fancy graphics, 16 render distance, 8 simulation distance.

Simply Optimised settings: Fast graphics, 12 render distance, 5 simulation distance.

Vanilla settings: Default
